subject: [PATCH v2 044/110] qnx6: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and addresses a long-standing issue. However, it would be great to get some feedback from the qnx6 maintainers before applying it.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series converts the qnx6 filesystem to use PRIino format for inode numbers, preparing it for widening via kino_t. It also corrects signed format specifiers to unsigned.
